candidates.title: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
candidates.summary: Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.

candidates.title: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna are now generally available on Amazon Bedrock
candidates.summary: Today, GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna from OpenAI are generally available on Amazon Bedrock, bringing the smartest family of models from OpenAI yet to Amazon Bedrock’s next-generation inference engine built for high-performance, security and reliability.

candidates.title: Building an agentic AI solution at Bluesight with Amazon Bedrock
candidates.summary: In this post, we describe how Bluesight used two AWS engagements and Amazon Bedrock AgentCore to evolve from a single-product AI prototype to Prism, a unified agentic AI solution spanning six healthcare compliance products. Prism Assistant for ControlCheck launched in May 2026 and is already in use by 20 health systems. A more complex multi-product agentic solution is on track for later in 2026.

candidates.title: The real AI race may no longer be at the frontier
candidates.summary: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue says enterprises increasingly want open models, due to cost, accessibility, and ownership. Do frontier models still matter if most production AI ends up running on open models?

candidates.title: Video-generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
candidates.summary: With the cash, the company aims to expand its world model offering and reach customers across geographies.

candidates.title: How data science teams use ChatGPT Work
candidates.summary: See how data science teams can use ChatGPT Work to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.
